response.justification: Candidate brings 13+ years of broad full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded and high-throughput data systems (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic), with solid software-craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based). However, the resume shows no direct experience building experimentation platforms, feature flagging, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis — the core of this IC6 Growth/Experimentation role. Tenure as Staff/Senior rather than Principal, and limited evidence of multi-team platform leadership at enterprise scale, make this a borderline fit worth a screening call to probe for unlisted experimentation work.
strengths: 13+ years polyglot engineering with low-latency, high-throughput services at Sociomantic
Strong software-craftsmanship foundation: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development
Founder/maintainer of an open-source platform showing systemic design ownership
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation frameworks, feature flagging, or A/B testing platforms
Resume lacks telemetry/metrics infrastructure and statistical/bias-detection work central to the role
Title and scope (Senior/Staff IC, single-team contributions) below the multi-team Principal/IC6 bar

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering fundamentals and polyglot production experience
Limited evidence of Principal-level cross-team platform leadership
